rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §29.015, which governs special education decision-making for children in foster care. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A foster parent may act as a parent of a child with a disability, as authorized under 20 U.S.C. Section 1415(b) and its subsequent amendments
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses foster care special education decision-making and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
